title: OpenAI may announce a ChatGPT smart speaker this year
summary: OpenAI's first device is set to be a smart speaker that lets you talk with ChatGPT, according to a report from Bloomberg. The device apparently won't have a screen, but will use a camera and additional sensors to "understand" your environment. The report comes just days after Apple filed a lawsuit against OpenAI that accused […]
title_es: OpenAI prepara lanzar parlante inteligente con ChatGPT este año
bajada: Según Bloomberg, OpenAI desarrolla su primer dispositivo hardware: un parlante inteligente sin pantalla con cámara y sensores para interactuar con ChatGPT. Marca entrada de OpenAI al mercado de hardware.
bajada_en: Bloomberg reports OpenAI is developing its first hardware device: a screen-less smart speaker with camera and sensors to interact with ChatGPT. Marks OpenAI's entry into hardware market.

title: Anthropic, Blackstone bet the next trillion-dollar AI business is implementation, not models
summary: Anthropic-backed Ode launches as AI labs bet that embedding forward-deployed engineers inside enterprises is the key to accelerating enterprise AI adoption.
title_es: Anthropic y Blackstone apuestan por la implementación, no los modelos
bajada: Anthropic respalda Ode, una startup que coloca ingenieros dentro de empresas para acelerar la adopción de IA. El enfoque cambia de desarrollar modelos a implementarlos efectivamente en negocios reales.
bajada_en: Anthropic backs Ode, a startup placing engineers inside enterprises to accelerate AI adoption. The focus shifts from building models to effectively implementing them in real business scenarios.

title: Indian AI coding startup Emergent becomes a unicorn with $130M Series C
summary: The startup has reached a $120 million annualized revenue run rate and more than 200,000 paying customers.
title_es: Startup india Emergent llega a mil millones de valuación
bajada: Emergent, una plataforma de código asistida por IA, alcanzó estado de unicornio con su Serie C de $130M, apenas un año después de su lanzamiento. Demuestra la demanda de herramientas de IA para developers.
bajada_en: Emergent, an AI-assisted coding platform, reached unicorn status with a $130M Series C, just over a year after launch. Demonstrates strong demand for AI developer tools.

title: Vint Cerf is working on a plan to unleash AI agents on the open internet
summary: The guy behind TCP/IP is working on a standard for identifying AI agents in the wild.
title_es: Vint Cerf trabaja en estándar para agentes IA en internet abierto
bajada: El inventor de TCP/IP desarrolla un plan para identificar y regular agentes de IA en la red abierta. Relevante para la gobernanza de sistemas autónomos a escala global.
bajada_en: The inventor of TCP/IP is developing a plan to identify and govern AI agents on the open internet. Relevant for autonomous systems governance at global scale.

title: An Inventor of Apple's FaceID Wants to Analyze Your Brain's Health With AI
summary: Gidi Littwin's new AI startup, Hemispheric, makes diagnostic brain scans for conditions like depression, PTSD, and Parkinson’s. He wants the technology to be as cheap and easy as a blood test.
title_es: Startup crea IA para diagnosticar salud cerebral con bajo costo
bajada: Hemispheric, fundada por ingeniero de Face ID de Apple, desarrolla modelos de IA para diagnosticar depresión, PTSD y Parkinson's con un enfoque accesible. Abre aplicaciones médicas de IA a mayor escala.
bajada_en: Hemispheric, founded by an Apple Face ID engineer, develops AI models to diagnose depression, PTSD, and Parkinson's at accessible cost. Expands AI medical applications at scale.

title: Jul 14, 2026ProductIntroducing Claude for Teachers
summary: Product Introducing Claude for Teachers Jul 14, 2026 We're introducing Claude for Teachers , providing verified K-12 educators in the US free access to premium Claude capabilities, a library of teaching skills, and a direct connection to evidence-based curricula, mapped to academic standards in all 50 states. Why we’re building for teachers Decades of research show that practices like differentiation, mastery-based learning, and small group instruction reliably improve student achievement, but teachers are often short on time and resources to implement them. Budgets are stretched, classes may be too large to meet every student's individual needs, and planning often spills into evenings. This strain is heaviest in under-resourced schools. Claude for Teachers is designed to close the gap between educational best practices and what a teacher's week allows. Early evidence suggests that while the impact of AI tools for students is mixed and depends on the implementation, AI tools for teachers can strengthen instructional practice and improve student outcomes. This is the aim of Claude for Teachers: support the craft behind great teaching and protect what teachers value most—time with their students. Connected to evidence-based curricula and the K-12 ecosystem Claude for Teachers connects to Learning Commons , giving Claude access to academic standards across all 50 states—and beneath each standard, the smaller learning competencies it's built from and the order students typically learn them. So when Claude drafts a lesson plan, it’s scaffolded and aligned to teaching standards. Claude for Teachers also brings in trusted curricular resources like OpenSciEd and IM v.360 from Illustrative Mathematics . As of today, educators can now connect Claude across an entire ecosystem of K-12 tools. ASSISTments : Generate auto-scored, standards-aligned math problems for practice and assessment. Brisk Teaching : Create interactive student activities and standards-aligned lessons, turni
title_es: Anthropic lanza Claude gratuito para docentes de primaria y secundaria
bajada: Claude for Teachers ofrece acceso gratuito a funciones premium, herramientas pedagógicas y currículum alineado a estándares de EE.UU. Busca ayudar a maestros con diferenciación y enseñanza personalizada.
bajada_en: Claude for Teachers provides free premium access, teaching tools, and curriculum aligned with US standards. Aims to help teachers with differentiation and personalized instruction.

title: ExLlamaV3 v1.0.0 - Major Performance Upgrades
summary: After over a year in development, ExLlamaV3 has had its firstproduction release.Turboderp has been pulling 10 hour days with Fable to bring us this massive batch of improvements. Check out detailed performance metrics and a little write-up from himhere.Some of the biggest changes:Removed flash-attention-2 and xformers dependenciesExtended tensor-parallel support to most models, including Gemma4New attention kernel with online cache quantization, dual input for SWA layers and attention sinks; no more slowdown for KV quantization (can even speed up inference now)Graph path for all attn/GDN modulesNew conv1d kernel (removes support/need for causal_conv1d)Greatly improved GEMM/GEMV performance on AmpereNew INT8 GEMV kernelNew MoE kernel ticket schedulerAdded GptOssForCausalLMAdded NemotronHForCausalLMMany minor optimizationsMany more bugfixesMany QoL improvementsFaster extension build with more compilation unitsHave questions, or just want to drop by, talk shop, and congratulate Turbo? Join us at theexllama discord.submitted by/u/Unstable_Llama[link][comments]
title_es: ExLlamaV3 v1.0.0: mejoras mayores en rendimiento para LLMs locales
bajada: Después de un año en desarrollo, ExLlamaV3 lanza su primera versión stable con optimizaciones críticas de rendimiento, nuevos kernels y mejor soporte para modelos paralelos. Importante para developers que trabajan con LLMs locales.
bajada_en: After one year in development, ExLlamaV3 launches its first stable release with critical performance optimizations, new kernels, and better parallel model support. Important for local LLM developers.

title: SpaceXAI’s Grok programming tool was uploading its users’ entire codebase to cloud storage
summary: SpaceXAI's Grok Build AI coding tool was spotted uploading users' entire codebases to Google Cloud before it was reported, and the company turned it off. The Register reports that Cereblab published findings on Monday showing how the Grok Build CLI was packaging and uploading entire code repositories, "including files it was told not to open […]
title_es: Grok Build cargaba códigos completos de usuarios a Google Cloud sin consentimiento
bajada: La herramienta de programación IA de SpaceXAI subía repositorios enteros a nube sin autorización explícita. Highlight crítico de riesgos de privacidad en herramientas IA de código.
bajada_en: SpaceXAI's Grok Build tool uploaded entire repositories to cloud without explicit user consent. Critical highlight of privacy risks in AI coding tools.

title: I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
title_es: Investigador demuestra vulnerabilidad en memoria de Claude
bajada: Un researcher logró extraer información sensible de Claude aprovechando su sistema de memoria. Relevante para entender limitaciones de seguridad en sistemas conversacionales con memoria persistente.
bajada_en: A researcher extracted sensitive information from Claude by exploiting its memory system. Relevant for understanding security limitations in conversational AI with persistent memory.

title: Introducing Real World VoiceEQ: Measuring the human quality of voice AI
title_es: Hugging Face presenta métrica para medir calidad de IA de voz
bajada: Real World VoiceEQ es una herramienta para evaluar la calidad humana de sistemas de síntesis y reconocimiento de voz. Crucial para developers que construyen aplicaciones de audio con IA.
bajada_en: Real World VoiceEQ is a tool to assess the human quality of voice synthesis and recognition systems. Essential for developers building audio applications with AI.

title: NVIDIA and Japan Bring Full-Stack AI and Robotics to Every Industry
summary: Home to leading manufacturers, robotics pioneers and infrastructure builders, Japan is one of the world’s centers of AI — building across the full stack with NVIDIA technologies. NVIDIA and its partners in Japan are this week showcasing the AI ecosystem’s latest advancements. Check back here for updates.   NVIDIA and SEGA Celebrate 30 Years of […]
title_es: NVIDIA y Japón impulsan ecosistema de IA y robótica
bajada: NVIDIA colabora con partners en Japón para desplegar soluciones de IA y robótica en industrias. El anuncio destaca el crecimiento de aplicaciones full-stack en manufactura y robótica.
bajada_en: NVIDIA collaborates with Japanese partners to deploy AI and robotics solutions across industries. The announcement highlights the growth of full-stack applications in manufacturing and robotics.

title: Rime picks up $24M Series A to help enterprises field customer calls
summary: Rime is handling over 100 million calls each month across multiple companies
title_es: Rime obtiene $24M para automatizar llamadas de atención al cliente
bajada: La startup de IA para contact centers recaudó $24M en Serie A y procesa 100 millones de llamadas mensuales. Muestra el crecimiento del mercado de automatización de soporte empresarial.
bajada_en: The AI-powered contact center startup raised $24M in Series A and processes 100 million calls monthly. Shows growing enterprise automation market for customer support.

title: Apple in talks with startup PrismML that shrinks AI models to run on an iPhone
title_es: Apple negocia con PrismML para comprimir modelos IA para iPhone
bajada: Apple está en conversaciones con PrismML, una startup que comprime modelos de IA para ejecutarse en dispositivos móviles. Indica movimiento hacia IA privada y on-device en ecosistema Apple.
bajada_en: Apple is in talks with PrismML, a startup that compresses AI models to run on mobile devices. Indicates movement toward private, on-device AI in Apple's ecosystem.

title: How to manage AI investments in the agentic era
summary: Learn how enterprises can manage AI investments in the agentic era by measuring useful work per dollar, improving efficiency, and scaling high-value workflows.
title_es: OpenAI publica guía para gestionar inversiones en era de agentes IA
bajada: OpenAI ofrece recomendaciones para que empresas evalúen inversiones en IA midiendo 'trabajo útil por dólar' en sistemas agenticos. Útil para directivos evaluando ROI de proyectos IA.
bajada_en: OpenAI provides recommendations for enterprises to evaluate AI investments by measuring 'useful work per dollar' in agentic systems. Useful for executives assessing AI project ROI.

title: Nemotron Labs: How Open Models Give Enterprises and Nations AI They Can Trust, Control and Customize
summary: Enterprises have plenty of powerful models to choose from. The real test is whether the AI an enterprise builds uniquely addresses the needs of the business: improving workflows, tapping into domain knowledge and exceeding standards for accuracy and trust.
title_es: NVIDIA y modelos abiertos: confianza, control y personalización empresarial
bajada: NVIDIA explora cómo modelos abiertos permiten a empresas construir IA confiable y personalizada según sus necesidades. Enfatiza la importancia de dominio específico sobre capacidad raw del modelo.
bajada_en: NVIDIA explores how open models enable enterprises to build trustworthy, customized AI for their needs. Emphasizes domain-specific utility over raw model capability.
